op.text: Resolved 2025-06-08: Dana texted Priya 'I miss you, can I buy you coffee, I want to talk about how I said what I said'; met for coffee on Thursday (a few days before 2025-06-08) and talked for three hours; both apologized (Dana for 'four-second verdict,' Priya for going 'polite-and-frozen'); Dana found regional arts infrastructure grant for studio buildout and helped Priya with application on Sunday before 2025-06-08; grant due end of June 2025; pottery class resumed Tuesday before 2025-06-08
[as of 2025-06-08] Jogging up to thirty minutes as of 2025-06-08; ankle recovery progressing

[as of 2025-06-08] Sailboat Dorothy Jean restoration nearly complete as of 2025-06-08: hull caulked and painted; boat described as 'actually-in-the-water-this-summer close'; Dana described getting 'a lump in my throat' looking at the boat

On 2025-06-08, regarding sailboat Dorothy Jean being nearly ready to sail, said: 'I keep standing back and looking at her and getting a lump in my throat.' and 'It's very much not nothing.' (2025-06-08)
